canonical_definition: A benchmark focused on APIs that load machine learning models, used to train and evaluate LLMs' ability to interface with ML services.
papers: Reducing Tool Hallucination via Reliability Alignment

definitions.text: A benchmark focused on APIs that load machine learning models, used to train and evaluate LLMs' ability to interface with ML services.
An out-of-domain test set used to evaluate a model's generalization ability on tool-use tasks with APIs it was not explicitly trained on.
definitions.paper: Reducing Tool Hallucination via Reliability Alignment
